title: XIAOMI Redmi 15C 6.9'' 4GBRAM/128GB ROM Android 15 -Midnight Black
description:
Xiaomi Redmi 15C will serve as the direct successor to the Redmi 14C, it is touted to bring a slightly refreshed design and a larger battery capacity.

While keeping its entry-level positioning, the device steps up durability with IP64-rated protection against dust and water splashes, and retains Corning Gorilla Glass 3 for display protection. Users can choose between a glass back or an eco leather silicone polymer option, depending on the color variant.

Color choices include Moonlight Blue, Mint Green, Midnight Gray, and Twilight Orange. The side-mounted fingerprint scanner returns for secure unlocking, while virtual proximity sensing handles basic interaction tasks.

Redmi 15C is basically a familiar upgrade if you want a recent budget phone with good performance and beefed up battery capacity, speaking of battery, also check out the Honor X70 with very large battery capacity.
